kraken-OCR
==========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which kraken-OCR installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using kraken-OCR, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load kraken-OCR/5.2.9-foss-2023a-CUDA-12.1.1
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
